About Georg

Training and Community

As an IT Support Engineer with 10 years of experience, my mission is to empower teams and communities through knowledge sharing and better processes. My focus is to bridge technical excellence with accessible learning.

What I Do

🎓 Training and Development

I design and deliver training programs, workshops, and learning materials that help support teams build skills in a structured way.

🏘️ Community Building

I actively contribute to professional communities and share best practices as a speaker at events and in knowledge-sharing formats.

📚 Knowledge Management

As a KCS-certified specialist, I build scalable knowledge systems and self-service content that empower users and reduce support effort.

🔧 Process Optimization

I create practical tools and structures that simplify support workflows and help teams focus on high-impact work.

Specializations

Linux Administration Knowledge-Centered Service (KCS) Technical Training Community Engagement Process Design Coaching & Mentoring Technical Documentation Customer Success

Beyond Work

When I am not creating training content or speaking at community events, I am experimenting with Arduino projects, exploring Linux systems, or discovering great food. Learning is a lifelong process for me, and I enjoy sharing new insights with others.

Let Us Connect

Interested in collaborating on training initiatives, community projects, or knowledge-sharing work? I would love to connect.

Get in touch Connect on LinkedIn

"Be excellent to each other"
